creator: mi@kot.ne.mediaone.net
text:
This is the TCL interface to the Gd library.

	I  kind  of dislike  ``configure'',  and  our TCL8  port
	continues  to  install  bogus  tclConfig.sh  (which  the
	software's configure  tries to use),  so I wrote  my own
	Makefile (files/Makefile.bsd).

	I chose not  to use tclstubs and had to  fix gdCmd.c for
	it (see patches/patch-aa).

	When the latest TCL changes, only the top-level Makefile
	of this port will have to be modified.
